name: Armadillo Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the jalapeno peppers in half lengthwise and remove all seeds (wear gloves). Keep both halves close together for later assembly.
2. Mix the Bisquick, raw sausage, and cheddar cheese.
3. Stuff each pepper half with Monterey Jack cheese and reassemble the peppers.
4. Take a handful of the Bisquick mixture and shape it around each pepper to resemble an elongated egg.
5. Dip each "armadillo egg" in beaten egg and roll in Shake 'n Bake.
6. Place on a broiler pan or cookie sheet and bake at 350°F for 25 minutes, or until crisp.
